callRationale: Used web_search_advanced_exa because the task required an explicit docs.firecrawl.dev source policy; included docs.firecrawl.dev as the only domain and maxAgeHours 0 to avoid stale cached search context.

Fetched the current v2 Search API reference page directly after search found it, because the full OpenAPI field definitions for country, timeout, and ignoreInvalidURLs were needed for a precise answer.
strengths: Advanced search exposed includeDomains and kept all returned search results on docs.firecrawl.dev.
The first search retrieved the exact current Search API reference and matched all expected terms.
The direct fetch returned enough current official documentation to answer all requested fields from a single primary source.
weaknesses: The search results also included older v0/v1 and localized docs pages, so an agent still has to choose the current v2 page carefully.
The fetch tool itself did not expose a source-policy or freshness parameter, so adherence depended on fetching only the known docs.firecrawl.dev URL selected from the policy-constrained search.
